title: Scented Wax Melts, SCENTORINI Wax Cubes, 8x70.9 gram Scented Soy Wax Melts for Wax Warmer, Series of 1
features: FLAVORS & SIZE - A cozy, rich seasonal mix of 8 flavors scented soy wax melts, including Blush Peony, Pumpkin, Apple & Cinnamon, Winter Cedarwood, Mint & White Jasmine, Coconut & Vanilla, Black Pomegranate, Mediterranean Fig. (2.5 oz/70.9 g each)

NATURAL SOY WAX MELTS – Made from natural soy wax, these hand poured wax tarts provide a clean burn and are easy to use. Wax melts does not need a wick flame to emit its fragrance which is a safer alternative to traditional candles, so you can enjoy without the worry of a flame.

EASY TO USE – Intended for use with electric wax melt burners, plug in wax warmers, and candle warmers. Simply add one cube to your wax warmer and enjoy the scent. these melting wax cubes will fill your room with a delightful aroma. Perfect for entryways, bedrooms, living rooms, bathrooms, offices, dens.

Gift Set - Relaxing and comforting scented waxes for ambience and guests. These wax cubes make great gifts, Easter basket and stocking stuffers, holiday party supplies, ALSO it’s good for Christmas gift
AFTER-SALE - If you found the package was broken, candle melted or other defective, please feel free to contact us in the first time. We will provide you a satisfactory solution.
